bme_extra_file_info Struct Reference
[Bare Metal Environment APIs]

Information for extra files in the system. More...

 Base physical address of the "extra" file.

Detailed Description

Information for extra files in the system.

Field Documentation

Base physical address of the "extra" file.

Length of the extra file, in bytes.
